findings.description: MSAgentFrameworkHarness.astream_invoke return type hint is 'AsyncIterator[Any]' instead of 'AsyncIterator[HarnessEvent]', deviating from the SdkHarnessAdapter contract in base.py and the parallel implementation in deep_agents.py. Additionally, HarnessEvent is referenced in the docstring but missing from the module imports, and 'import json' is performed inside the event loop rather than at the top level.
findings.resolution: In src/assistant/harnesses/sdk/ms_agent_fw.py: 1) Move 'import json' to the top-level imports. 2) Add 'HarnessEvent' to the import list from assistant.harnesses.sdk.events. 3) Update the MSAgentFrameworkHarness.astream_invoke return type hint to 'AsyncIterator[HarnessEvent]' for contract consistency.
